title: Ettelbruck、Diekirch Canton — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Ettelbruck、Diekirch Cantonの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

EttelbruckはDiekirch Cantonにある人口8,900の都市です。A charming market town in northern Luxembourg at the confluence of the Alzette and Sauer rivers, known as the gateway to the Ardennes.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
